_comment_controller_params: Geometric params (tendon_distance_mm, angle_offset_rad_ccw) are derived automatically from the scene's generation config at load time (generate.tdcr_geometry_from_scene), so they can't drift when the scene is rerouted. Only teleop-feel params live here; add a geometric key to override the derived value.
_comment_command_frame: command_frame_offset_rad ROTATES the up/down/left/right TDCR command into the bend plane so it matches the viewer when the robot is mounted at an angle (angle_offset_rad_ccw can't do this -- it only matches tendon assignment, it does not rotate the bend direction). +1.5708 = 90 deg; flipping its sign inverts BOTH axes. command_mirror_x flips ONLY left/right (F/H) -- the mount leaves the bend plane mirror-flipped relative to the viewer, which a rotation alone can't correct.
description: Combined Franka (IK) + TDCR (joint) control via keyboard
